name: Apple Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, combine the pancake mix, milk, egg, and oil. Mix until slightly rough; aim for a batter that is thinner than regular pancakes but thicker than a crepe.
2. Heat an 8-inch shallow Teflon (sloped-sided) pan with a drop of oil over medium heat. Pour in about one-fourth of the batter to form a thin pancake.
3. Allow the pancake to cook until bubbles form on top and the underside is lightly golden brown but not fully cooked through.
4. Spoon 2 tablespoons of apple sauce onto half of the pancake. Quickly fold the other half over so it puffs up in the pan.
5. Cook for about a minute, being careful not to burn, then turn briefly to cook the other side and warm the applesauce mixture inside.
6. Serve each puff on a platter, top with cinnamon and sliced strawberries, and dust with powdered sugar.
Use 1 tablespoon of oil to reduce fat content. ...George
